TOOL_DIR is /opt/term/proton
BM_DIR = /tmp/PROTON-benchmark.009w0l

void master(void) 
{ 

  {
  {if (m_pc == 0) {
    goto M_ENTRY;
  } else {
    {if (m_pc == 1) {
      goto M_WAIT;
    } else {

    }}
  }}
  M_ENTRY: ;
  {
  while (1) {
    while_0_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    E_1 = 1;
    immediate_notify();
    E_1 = 2;
    }
    {
    while (1) {
      while_1_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
      m_pc = 1;
      m_st = 2;

      goto return_label;
      M_WAIT: ;
    }
    while_1_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
    }
  }
  while_0_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return;
}
}

void init_model(void) 
{ 

  {
  m_i = 1;
  t1_i = 1;
  t2_i = 1;
  t3_i = 1;
  t4_i = 1;
  t5_i = 1;
  t6_i = 1;

  return;

int stop_simulation(void) 
{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  {if (tmp) {
    __retres2 = 0;
    goto return_label;
  } else {

  }}
  __retres2 = 1;
  return_label: /* CIL Label */ 
  return (__retres2);
}
}
void start_simulation(void) 
{ int kernel_st ;
  int tmp ;
  int tmp___0 ;

  {
  {
  kernel_st = 0;
  update_channels();
  init_threads();
  fire_delta_events();
  activate_threads();
  reset_delta_events();
  }
  {
  while (1) {
    while_9_continue: /* CIL Label */ ;
    {
    kernel_st = 1;
    eval();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 2;
    update_channels();
    }
    {
    kernel_st = 3;
    fire_delta_events();
    activate_threads();
    reset_delta_events();
    }
    {
    tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
    }
    {if (tmp == 0) {
      {
      kernel_st = 4;
      fire_time_events();
      activate_threads();
      reset_time_events();
      }
    } else {

    }}
    {
    tmp___0 = stop_simulation();
    }
    {if (tmp___0) {
      goto while_9_break;
    } else {

    }}
  }
  while_9_break: /* CIL Label */ ;
  }

  return;
}
}
int main(void) 
{ int __retres1 ;

  {
  {
  init_model();
  start_simulation();
  }
  __retres1 = 0;
  return (__retres1);
}
}

End Main   

Input File is : transmitter.06_false-unreach-call_false-termination.cil_braced.c

 CBMC instrumentation

Rewriter Init

Finished call to function ParseAST   
typedef enum {myFalse, myTrue} myBool; myBool __VERIFIER_nondet_myBool(void);
extern void __VERIFIER_reached_control(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_loop_head(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_control_true(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_control_false(int, char const *);
extern void __VERIFIER_error() __attribute__ ((__noreturn__));

extern int __VERIFIER_nondet_int();
/* Generated by CIL v. 1.3.6 */
/* print_CIL_Input is true */

void error(void) 
{ 

  {
  ERROR: __VERIFIER_error();
  return;
}

void immediate_notify(void) ;
void master(void) 
{ 

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(61, __func__);
if (m_pc == 0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(61, __func__);

    goto M_ENTRY;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(63, __func__);

    { __VERIFIER_reached_control(64, __func__);
if (m_pc == 1) { __VERIFIER_control_true(64, __func__);

      goto M_WAIT;

}
void fire_delta_events(void) 
{ 

  {
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(660, __func__);
if (M_E == 0) { __VERIFIER_control_true(660, __func__);

    M_E = 1;
  } else { __VERIFIER_control_false(662, __func__);


  }}
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(665, __func__);

{ int tmp ;
  int __retres2 ;

  {
  {
  tmp = exists_runnable_thread();
  }
  { __VERIFIER_reached_control(988, __func__);

  }}

  return (__retres2);

}
